# Chelating Agent

**Summary**: A chemical compound that forms stable complexes with metal ions.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-alarifi|Alarifi, 2015]] used DTPA-K5 as a chelating agent to alter the mineralogy of rock surfaces and improve wettability.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods



## Key Findings Across Sources

- Treatment with 5 wt% DTPA-K5 in seawater resulted in more negative zeta potential values, indicating successful surface modification. ([[2015-alarifi|Alarifi, 2015, p. 73]])
